sutta:
the buddha said monks there are these 4 unthinkables not to be thought of thinking of which 1 would be distraught and come to grief what are the 4 of buddhas monks the range is unthinkable not to be thought of of 1 who is in jhana amongst the ranges of his jhana is unthinkable not to be thought of the result of karma amongst is unthinkable not to be thought of world speculation monks is unthinkable not to be thought of thinking of which 1 would be distraught and would come to grief these monks are the 4 unthinkables thinking of which 1 would be destroyed and would come to grief see another yes just know the buddha said there are 4 things that we should not think about should not think too much about the first 1 is the range of a buddha range of a buddha possibly could mean the power of a buddha the ability of a buddha is hard to fathom the power of a buddha no need to speculate about it and i would have said no second 1 is jhana the range of jhana and this 1 is a bit hard to understand the depth of china or something like that the third 1 is the result the vipaka of karma karma is intentional action and uh to speculate on the karma is uh [Music] very difficult and the buddha to think about karma very hard to explain karma because karma involves many many lifetimes past lifetimes now we have not seen so sometimes sometimes some people um they find it a bit difficult sometimes to believe that there's such a thing as karma why because they say a person a particular person has done a lot of evil yet in spite of being an evil person he's enjoying life and this is 1 of those things because we haven't seen his past karma in the past we might have done a lot of good people can change you know people often change for example a person when he's poor he's very hard working very humble and all the good qualities you can find because he's he's he's low uh he's low in life but later when he comes into a lot of money becomes a very very rich multi-millionaire i see that person will change will change a lot can become very arrogant can be changed in many many ways so that you see the former person and the new person it look like 2 different persons altogether that's why uh that's why it's very hard to to see that a person you see him doing evil but in the past he might have been a very virtuous person that's why he's enjoying life having a lot of good good good fruits of karma so the buddha is a result of karma and don't speculate too much about karma the fourth 1 is world speculation and about the future of the world uh is something that buddha said no point to think about [Music] things happen now that are quite unexpected like people never expected the ussr soviet union to break up in such a big world powers and they broke up my people like princess diana are suddenly dying
